activated_rules.rule_name: Mixed origins matching requirement per article
EU origin normalization and mixed EU/Non-EU matching

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Flexlink AB' with address in Sweden is explicitly found as invoice issuer and in invoice header, including exact country match Sweden after allowed normalization (rule 4.1.0 and 4.1.4). No mismatch of company name or country.

consignee.invoice_value: MONDELEZ KINH DO VIET NAM JOINT STOCK COMPANY
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JSC' is explicitly stated in certificate. Invoice shows shipping address to 'MONDELEZ KINH DO VIET NAM JOINT STOCK COMPANY' and invoice addressee is 'Flexlink Engineering Sdn Bhd'. Certificatets consignee appears not explicitly as invoice buyer or primary consignee field. However, shipping address is to Vietnam matching consignee country. Given invoice shipping address role and explicit country match Vietnam, status set to MATCH per 4.2.0 and 4.2.3.

goods_description.motivation: All article numbers in certificate are found in invoice items as exact matches with allowed normalization. The certificate lists multiple products with corresponding quantities and part numbers matched exactly in invoice. The certificate indicates multiple countries of origin linked to parts; invoice items specify origin per item or grouped consistent with certificate. EU normalizations are applied due to presence of EU countries. No mismatches in article numbers or descriptions found.

quantity.motivation: Quantities from certificate in pieces (PCS) are exactly matched line-by-line with invoice quantities after allowed normalizations. No conflicts or missing quantities noted. No contradictory numeric values in quantity or weight fields found.

origin.certificate_value: Poland, Sweden, Germany, Denmark, Estonia, China, Czech Republic
origin.invoice_value: Invoice clearly states CoO for each item lines matching these countries. EU origin normalization applied since EU countries are listed. No ices/EU country conflicts found.
origin.motivation: All origins listed in certificate appear explicitly in invoice item lines as 'CoO' annotations matching the certificate countries. EU country names normalized and accepted. No conflicting or missing country of origin entries for certificate countries found in invoice.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All required control points match between certificate and invoice with no contradictions or missing information. Document pair is eligible for auto-approval.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla relevanta uppgifter från certifikatet kan verifieras i fakturan utan avvikelser. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
